next_actions.description: Useful Compute rewards stay dry-run until a separate consensus / governance procedure ships. The engine never flips that switch.
next_actions.title: Do not activate Useful Compute rewards

next_actions.description: Consensus rules, miner code, node code and the RPC schema are strictly out of scope. No Trinity script can touch them.
next_actions.title: Do not modify consensus

next_actions.description: The engine touches no wallet, no key, no transaction broadcast path. Funds never leave the operator's address.
next_actions.title: Do not move funds

next_actions.description: The public Useful Compute worker / API is unchanged. The engine never enqueues a paid task there.
next_actions.title: Do not publish reward-bearing tasks

next_actions.description: Capsule registration is the operator's manual decision. The engine prepares a ready-to-register bundle and stops; broadcasting requires an explicit operator step.
next_actions.title: Do not register on chain without operator decision
